ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, developer, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback submission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the feedback */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Text comments provided by the user */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (if applicable) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feedback category */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feedback status */,
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feedback priority */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application or service */,
  "screenshot" TEXT /* URL or path of the screenshot provided by the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's device and browser */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the feedback has been resolved */,
  "submitted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was submitted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was deleted (if applicable) */,
  "deleted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who deleted the feedback (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_priority_id FOREIGN KEY ("priority_id") REFERENCES feedback_priorities ("priority_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES feedback_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES feedback_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the feedback category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feedback category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the feedback status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feedback status */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the status is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback_priorities" (
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback priority */,
  "priority_name" TEXT /* Name of the feedback priority */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feedback priority */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the priority is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("priority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback assignment */,
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feedback being assigned */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user or team the feedback is assigned to */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was assigned */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was resolved (if applicable) */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feedback status */,
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feedback priority */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the assignment has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_assignments_feedback_id FOREIGN KEY ("feedback_id") REFERENCES feedback ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_assignments_priority_id FOREIGN KEY ("priority_id") REFERENCES feedback_priorities ("priority_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_assignments_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES feedback_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_assignments_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application or service */,
  "app_name" TEXT /* Name of the application or service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the application or service */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the application is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback_applications" (
  "feedback_app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback-application association */,
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feedback submission */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application or service */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the association is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_applications_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_applications_feedback_id FOREIGN KEY ("feedback_id") REFERENCES feedback ("feedback_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback_category_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback-category mapping */,
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feedback submission */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feedback category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the mapping is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_category_mapping_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES feedback_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_category_mapping_feedback_id FOREIGN KEY ("feedback_id") REFERENCES feedback ("feedback_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback_status_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status change */,
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feedback submission */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the new status */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status was changed */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who changed the status */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the history entry is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_status_history_feedback_id FOREIGN KEY ("feedback_id") REFERENCES feedback ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_status_history_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES feedback_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_status_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feedback submission (if applicable) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was read (if applicable) */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the notification has been read */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the notification is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_feedback_id FOREIGN KEY ("feedback_id") REFERENCES feedback ("feedback_id")
)
